a.xlink:title: Base context class for node callbacks.
Specialized context for binary operation callbacks.
Context for N-ary composite operation callbacks.
Minimal concrete context for Constant — no extra fields beyond the base.
Specialized context for filter node callbacks.
Specialized context for generator node callbacks.
Specialized context for stochastic generator callbacks.
Context for ComputeOutNode - provides readback buffer access.
Context for GeometryWriterNode - provides vertex buffer access.
Context for TextureNode - provides pixel buffer access.
Context for InputNode callbacks - provides input event access.
GPU-compatible context for binary operation callbacks.
GPU-compatible context for composite operation callbacks.
GPU-accelerated context for logic node callbacks.
